question: Which is one of the long-term ecological and economic consequences of recurrent droughts ?

options.1: Increase in soil fertility and forest cover
options.2: Depletion of groundwater, land degradation and rural migration
options.3: Rapid industrial growth in drought-affected areas
options.4: High rainfall leading to flood risk
